creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2008-08-22 05:04:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/lftp             Makefile distinfo 
  Added files:
    ftp/lftp/files       patch-build-aux-ltmain.sh 
                         patch-src-Makefile.in 
  Removed files:
    ftp/lftp/files       patch-ltmain.sh patch-src_Makefile.in 
  Log:
  - Update lftp to v3.7.4.
  
  * fix a coredump in `kill all'.
  * fix compilation problems on some systems.
  * use getdate from gnulib.
  
  PR:             ports/126374
  Submitted by:   Ganael Laplanche <ganael.laplanche@martymac.com> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.127     +1 -2      ports/ftp/lftp/Makefile
  1.85      +3 -3      ports/ftp/lftp/distinfo

  1.4       +0 -15     ports/ftp/lftp/files/patch-ltmain.sh (dead)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/ftp/lftp/files/patch-src-Makefile.in (new)
  1.4       +0 -11     ports/ftp/lftp/files/patch-src_Makefile.in (dead)
